description:
Recto: Legal document. Dated: beginning of Ṭevet 1457 Seleucid = December 1145 CE. In which Yaḥyā b. Ṣedaqa confirms that a house which he had given to his sister Umm al-[...] (who it seems had meanwhile died) and which was occupied by her son Abū ʿAlī, is given to the latter and his children. 

Verso: Unrelated legal document, specifying conditions for a partnership. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
